name: Bazaarvoice
what_it_does: Bazaarvoice is an enterprise ratings and reviews platform with an API for collecting, moderating, and syndicating UGC (reviews, Q&A, photos) across a network of 12,000+ retail sites.
use_cases: Syndicating product reviews from a brand's DTC site to major retailers (Walmart, Target, Best Buy) via the Bazaarvoice network
Collecting and moderating product reviews at scale with automated fraud detection and content moderation pipelines
Fetching ratings and review content to power AI-driven product recommendation and merchandising agents
Pulling Q&A content to train product knowledge bases or automate customer support responses
Aggregating review analytics across retail channels for brand performance reporting
not_for: Small ecommerce businesses — Yotpo, Reviews.io, or Stamped are far more cost-appropriate
Service or local business reviews — Trustpilot or Google Business Profile are better fits
Fast, lightweight review widgets — Bazaarvoice is heavyweight enterprise infrastructure
best_when: You're a large CPG or consumer electronics brand that needs to syndicate reviews across major retail partners and requires enterprise-grade moderation and analytics.
avoid_when: You're under $50M in revenue or don't need multi-retailer syndication — the cost and complexity are unjustifiable.

auth.notes: Passkey (API key) authentication — separate keys for Conversations API (read/write UGC) and Analytics API. Keys are provisioned by Bazaarvoice during onboarding. No self-serve key management.

pricing.notes: Fully enterprise-priced with annual contracts. Pricing based on SKU count, order volume, and number of retail syndication partners. Requires sales engagement — no self-serve signup.

performance.rate_limits: Not publicly documented; enterprise-tier clients typically have high limits negotiated in contract

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Developer portal (developer.bazaarvoice.com) provides reasonable endpoint documentation but is incomplete for newer APIs. Error responses use a proprietary format with error codes that require consulting docs to decode.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Review submission endpoints are idempotent by product/author combination within a time window. Analytics queries are read-only and fully idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API keys are provisioned by BV support — no self-serve; onboarding can take days to weeks
Conversations API and Analytics API use different base URLs and auth configs
Content moderation adds latency — submitted reviews may not appear for 24–72 hours
Syndication to retailers is not real-time — batch processing occurs on a schedule
Response envelopes are verbose with nested error arrays — parse carefully
Staging environment requires separate credentials from production

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. GDPR and CCPA compliant. TLS enforced. No OAuth — passkey auth is static and lacks scope granularity. Enterprise contracts include DPA and security review process.
